overview.description: The Calamos Bitcoin Structured Alt Protection ETF - April (CBOA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is actively managed to provide limited upside potential, while fully hedging downside risk relative to bitcoin over an annual period. The funds objective attempts to remove the volatility of a volatile asset class that is uncorrelated to traditional securities CBOA was launched on Apr 7, 2025 and is issued by Calamos.
